descFull: 🔥 作者：常炎隆(Author: ChangYanlong):HEVC/H.265 网页直播/点播播放器 支持硬解！ 支持H.265的HttpFLV/HLS/MP4/TS/FLV/M3U8/Websocket播放。 🔥 A HEVC/H.265 Web Player, Support hard-decoding! for LIVE/VOD stream. Support H.265 Codec with HttpFLV/HLS/MP4/TS/FLV/M3U8/Websocket.
